text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night, Curren Chan ponders something alone
in her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Just adjust the exposure and contrast, add a
warm filter... and finally a filter for my skin.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...I've really been editing pics like this for too
long. I need to hurry and get my skin cleared up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan continues to battle with skin
problems no one knows about.
